title: Wasteland Expanded
description: The Wasteland Reborn mod expanded with extra content and bug fixes
body:
## About
This is a continuation of the Wasteland Reborn mod which was a port of the original Wasteland mod by Silver_Weasek.

It adds a new world type that has little to no water or grass. Zombies can spawn at day, and the mod will be a challenging Minecraft survival experience, especially when paired with other difficult mods.

 

This mod is a new worldtype that simulates a desolate wasteland.

The structures, biomes and other options such as bunkers can be disabled in the mod config file.


To use the mod on a server, simply set the worldtype to "WASTELAND" in the server config file.

 

## Older Versions
Wasteland reborn: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wasteland-reborn

For 1.9.4 and 1.10.2: http://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/2721105-wasteland-mod-the-lost

For 1.7.10: http://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/2274942-wasteland-mod-1-4-4-abandoned-world-cities-and

If you're looking for an even older version: Google is your friend.
